summary: Frontend UI testing completed for Quran Teaching Platform (مقرأة الرقي). All public pages and authenticated pages tested successfully. Arabic RTL text displays correctly. Mobile responsiveness verified on all viewport sizes.

minor.issue: Returns 4 teachers instead of expected 3 - duplicate test admin entry exists from backend testing (test_admin_1768250195028)

action_items: Consider cleaning up duplicate test admin teacher entry (test_admin_1768250195028) from database
critical_code_review_comments: All frontend pages load correctly with Arabic RTL text
Landing page: Hero section, features section, about section, CTA, and footer all render correctly
Login page: Google OAuth button works correctly, redirects to auth.emergentagent.com
Teachers list page: Shows all teachers with proper cards, book buttons work
Student dashboard: Stats cards, action buttons, messages section all functional
Profile page: Form displays correctly with save functionality
Mobile responsiveness: All pages tested on 390x844 viewport - layouts adapt correctly
Tablet responsiveness: All pages tested on 768x1024 viewport - layouts adapt correctly
data-testid attributes present on all interactive elements for testing
RTL direction (dir='rtl') correctly set on App component
test_credentials: Test user created and cleaned up after testing
seed_data_creation: Temporary test user created for authenticated page testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend pages tested successfully. The app uses Google OAuth for authentication. To test authenticated flows, create a test user and session using mongosh commands in /app/auth_testing.md. There's a duplicate test admin teacher in the database that could be cleaned up.
